source_pr.title: stats: use constant rand seed to make cm sktech test stable

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
